cluster_context.description: The context name of the cluster to use.

k8s_autopilot_channel.description: The GCE update channel to use for updating the cluster.

k8s_autopilot_version.description: The version of the GKE Autopilot cluster to use.

k8s_autopilot_labels.description: The labels to apply to the cluster.

password_apr1.description: The password hash for the user to access the cluster.
